name: Fred Wesley
abstract: Fred Wesley (born July 4, 1943) is an American trombonist who worked with James Brown in the 1960s and 1970s, and Parliament-Funkadelic in the second half of the 1970s.

interviews.title: Fred Wesley interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, November 21, 2024

concerts.label: David Krakauer's Klezmer Madness! with Special Guest Fred Wesley

about_quotes.speaker: Sam Kininger
about_quotes.evidence: I got to play with Maceo Parker, Fred Wesley and Pee Wee Ellis, on stage, right next to me.
about_quotes.doc_title: Sam Kininger interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, May 27, 2011
